title: Trischidium vestitum
taxonomy: Trischidium vestitum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Trischidium vestitum is further broken down to the order Fabales and the class Magnoliopsida. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. At the genus level, it is part of the genus Trischidium.
